document.source_title: From title contenders to freefall: What’s gone wrong for Punjab Kings

claims.claim_text: Punjab Kings have lost five straight matches.
claims.evidence_text: But the momentum has disappeared quickly for the Shreyas Iyer-led side, who slumped to a fifth straight defeat after losing to Mumbai Indians (MI) in Dharamshala on Thursday.

claims.claim_text: PBKS has struggled with their middle order.
claims.evidence_text: Most successful IPL teams rely heavily on middle-order depth and finishing power. PBKS have not consistently had that this season.

entities.name: Punjab Kings
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Mohali, Punjab.
entities.evidence_text: Punjab Kings (PBKS) looked like the team to beat in the first half of IPL 2026.

entities.name: Yuzvendra Chahal
entities.evidence_text: Chahal’s effectiveness during the winning run itself was modest.

entities.name: Arshdeep Singh
entities.evidence_text: PBKS have two proven wicket-takers in Arshdeep Singh and Yuzvendra Chahal.

entities.name: Ricky Ponting
entities.evidence_text: Head coach Ricky Ponting admitted the issue had spread through the squad.

events.event: Punjab Kings lost to Mumbai Indians
events.evidence_text: who slumped to a fifth straight defeat after losing to Mumbai Indians (MI) in Dharamshala on Thursday.

metrics.name: Matches Won
metrics.evidence_text: winning six of their first seven matches

metrics.name: Average Runs in Defeats
metrics.evidence_text: they have scored 171 runs at an average of 34.2.
